description: NorthStar Health innovation and research knowledge base, backed by Azure AI Search.

tools.name: list_innovations
tools.description: List innovations, optionally filtered by category, target market, market readiness or max launch year.

max_launch_year.description: Only return innovations expected to launch on or before this year.

top.description: Maximum number of innovations to return.

tools.name: search_innovations
tools.description: Search innovations semantically by concept, technology or trend.

top.description: Maximum number of innovations to return.

tools.name: get_innovation
tools.description: Get a single innovation's full record by id (e.g. 'INN-001').

tools.name: list_trends
tools.description: List the emerging trends addressed across the innovation base, with counts.
